capabilities_used.evidence: [2026-03-31] 直接写 "boxed in between 2 heavy liquidation pools: 69-70K shorts and 64-65K longs"；[2025-11-29] 明确比较 "Long liq levels: 321 Short liq levels: 152"；图2整张图就是按不同价位的流动性/挂单密度推演 62K-40K 的磁吸区。

他反复用 "sweep" 语言组织交易：[2026-04-08] "We’ve swept the high into the 10th"；[2025-06-29] "Swept the highs ✅"；[2025-06-28] "If we sweep the lows, I will long, If we sweep the highs & accept back into range, I will short"。图7也把多个 pivot 前后的 "Aggressive hunt before inverse narrative" 画成扫流动性后反转。
[2026-03-31] "we are in a ranging market"；[2026-03-30] "Chop. Chop. Chop..."；[2025-12-31] "16 straight days of chop"。他的处理方式不是追突破，而是等待区间上下沿和流动性池被扫。

[2026-01-30] "The trend is bearish and liquidity sits below"；[2026-01-30] "The $BTC bear market started 3 months ago"；[2025-12-31] "The $BTC bull run has officially ended." 他会先定义大级别 regime，再决定只做顺势空或等极限位置做反身性多。
[2026-01-29] "rejecting the mid-range and sweeping 83.9K... If we hold 83.9K, 87.4K-88K can be tested. Unable to hold 83.9K = sub 80K next."；[2026-03-31] 在 64-65K longs 与 69-70K shorts 两端之间做区间思维。
[2026-03-31] "The rhythm and duration of $BTC cycles are evolving. The 4 year cycle is intact until it isn't." 图6专门比较各轮上涨时长 1216D→1096D→882D→574D，属于明确的周期压缩模型。
[2026-01-30] "The trend is bearish"、"those who think they’re safe below range lows will get liquidated"；[2026-04-07] 又说 "RR no longer justifies staying short"，说明不是无脑抄底，而是等到赔率和结构变了才转多。
他大量使用前高/前低/季度高低/周开盘翻转成支撑阻力的框体逻辑：[2025-09-30] "BTC ended up flipping the Q1 candle high. In order to validate further upside, we need to hold this zone." 图1、图7里的灰框/白框都像是 breaker/flip 区。
图5直接在 Gold 1972 vs BTC 2027 对照中标出 0.382/0.5 回撤框；图4也用比例衰减与上界/下界的回撤结构推演路径，说明他会把 fib 回撤作为 swing 定位的一部分。

[2025-11-29] "This means that 10-14TH ... rally into FOMC"；[2025-12-30] "January the 13th is CPI... BTC has dropped on average 5-8% after this period"；[2025-11-29] "the 14th of December happens right after FOMC"。他会把宏观事件窗口当成波动触发器。
[2025-05-30] "The drop in M2 is clearly mirrored in Bitcoin’s price action." 宏观不是他的主框架，但他会在大级别方向判断里拿 M2 做背景确认。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: CME Gap Fill Bias
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Uses weekend CME gaps as a high-probability directional magnet, often with a Monday timing filter and structure confirmation before targeting the fill.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 把周末 CME 缺口当成高概率价格磁吸目标，并常叠加周一时间过滤和结构确认后再去做回补。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: [2025-06-29] "100% confidence this will get filled next week"；[2025-08-30] "98% of Weekend Gaps get filled"；[2026-01-31] "CME Closed at 84.2K. You already know 98% of these get filled within 2 weeks."

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Calendar Pivot Narrative Inversion
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Maps specific dates or recurring day-count pivots as likely narrative reversal windows; if the market is strongly bullish into the pivot, expect a sweep then inversion, and vice versa.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 把特定日期或固定天数枢轴视为叙事反转窗口；若价格在枢轴前强烈偏多，常预期先扫流动性再反向，反之亦然。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: [2026-03-30] "10th April. Pay attention. The narrative into this pivot will likely reverse within 1–2 weeks."；图7用一系列垂直日期线标注 "Aggressive hunt before inverse narrative"。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Open/Close Anchor Levels
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Treats daily, weekly, monthly, quarterly, and yearly opens/closes plus wick highs/lows as premium structural anchors for validation, rejection, and reversal.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 把日/周/月/季/年开收盘与影线高低点当作核心结构锚点，用于验证、拒绝和反转判断。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: [2025-11-29] "I pay particular attention to weekly opens/weekly wick highs and lows"；[2025-08-29] "BTC is testing its previously monthly open right now. This is a crucial level."；[2025-09-30] "daily close strategy"。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Cross-Asset Historical Analog Mapping
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Projects current BTC structure by overlaying it with historical paths from other assets or prior cycles, using geometry, retracements, and timing analogs rather than only same-asset TA.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 通过与其他资产或过去周期的历史路径做几何、回撤和时间类比，来推演 BTC 当前结构，而不只依赖同资产 TA。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 图5直接把 "Gold 1972" 与 "BTC 2027" 并列；[2026-03-31] 长文标题就是 "1972 Gold vs $BTC"。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Narrative Figure Contrarian Signal
new_capabilities_proposed.name_zh: 意见领袖叙事反向信号
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Uses viral public narratives, influencer posts, and market-wide FUD/hopium as contrarian markers when they cluster near a structural level.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 当市场级 FUD/鸡血叙事与关键结构位重合时，把意见领袖和社媒情绪当作反向信号使用。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 图3把 CZ 的几条 "buy the dip" 类推文贴在 BTC 图上；[2026-03-31] 还写 "Looks like the FUD this cycle is quantum computing fears... always convenient how this 'news' shows up right when $BTC is..."

personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 先定义失效位，再围绕失效位建立高赔率交易，而不是先有方向后找理由。

personal_quirks.quote: 70% waiting, 20% planning, and 10% execution. Whether you like it or not, trading will test your patience. It’s not supposed to be fun, it’s supposed to be boring. If it feels fun, you’re not trading.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 等待和计划远重于出手；交易应当流程化、无聊、可重复，而不是追求刺激。

personal_quirks.quote: You can either go with the 90% statistic or attempt to trade against it.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 当历史统计显著偏向一侧时，优先服从概率而不是主观预测。

personal_quirks.quote: Whether you like it or not, we are going sub 60K an there is absolutely nothing you can do about it.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 一旦他认为结构已经确认，会用极强确定性表达，不给模糊中间地带。
把自己的 edge 归因于长期重复识别结构与时机，而非偶然命中。

unique_traits: 他和普通 TA 交易员的区别，不只是画支撑阻力，而是把流动性分布、扫单路径、日期枢轴和长周期类比同时压到一张图上。另一特点是极强的公开交易员人格：高置信度、先给失效位与路径、再用事后验证强化自己的框架。相比纯价格行为派，他更像“结构+流动性+时间窗口”的混合型叙事交易员。

high_conviction_phrases: absolutely nothing you can do about it
low_conviction_phrases: my next swing will likely be
